payload.answer: Recall returned mem_new because it is the current memory for Sam from Goldman. mem_old was filtered out because it has been superseded, so it should not be surfaced as a current fact.
payload.decision: recall returned mem_new because it is the current non-superseded memory for Sam from Goldman; mem_old was filtered because it is marked as superseded and should not be presented as current.

entity_resolution.reason: The query refers to Sam from Goldman, and recall selected the current memory matching that context while excluding the superseded prior memory.

memory_cards.statement: mem_new is the active memory associated with Sam from Goldman.
mem_old was excluded from recall because it is superseded by a newer memory.

details: Explained why mem_old was filtered as superseded.
Did not present mem_old as a current fact.

repair_options: If mem_old was incorrectly marked superseded, remove or revise its supersession metadata.
If mem_new is not the intended current memory, update the supersession link or entity resolution for Sam from Goldman.
If both memories describe different Sams, split or disambiguate the entities.
